channel.title: glazeruns TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from glazeruns

item.title: Arizona Monster 300
item.description: Arizona Monster 300

item.title: rough night last night Arizona Monster 300 #runtok

item.title: that was hard #runtok #arizonamonster300
item.description: that was hard #runtok #arizonamonster300

item.title: rough night at Arizona Monster 300
item.description: rough night at Arizona Monster 300

item.title: can't believe we're on day 4
item.description: can't believe we're on day 4

item.title: ere dehydration. Hypovelmic shock. Vomiting. Dizziness. Full body cramps. Arizona Monster 300 miler did not go to plan, but @Eli Wehbe will heal up and come back stronger for Cocodona. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: ere dehydration. Hypovelmic shock. Vomiting. Dizziness. Full body cramps. Arizona Monster 300 miler did not go to plan, but @Eli Wehbe will heal up and come back stronger for Cocodona. Smile, or you're doing it wrong. #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: heard the last 100 miles is the easiest #runtok #arizonamonster300
item.description: heard the last 100 miles is the easiest #runtok #arizonamonster300

item.title: actually I'm 212 miles in #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: actually I'm 212 miles in #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: ground hog day #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: ground hog day #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: It's not the setback it's the comeback
item.description: It's not the setback it's the comeback

item.title: Arizona Monster 300
item.description: Arizona Monster 300

item.title: 8 miles into a hot 21 mile segment. This saved us #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: 8 miles into a hot 21 mile segment. This saved us #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: almost done #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: almost done #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: find yourself a crew that won't let you quit #runtok #arizonamonster300
item.description: find yourself a crew that won't let you quit #runtok #arizonamonster300

item.title: Keeping me on a short leash. 10 minutes at a time. Sometimes I would wake up after 7 minutes. Just enough to reset the brain. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: Keeping me on a short leash. 10 minutes at a time. Sometimes I would wake up after 7 minutes. Just enough to reset the brain. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: 300 miles is far. pretty sure the bottoms are completely bruised #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: 300 miles is far. pretty sure the bottoms are completely bruised #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: and @Lauren Glaze had to tell me I snored #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: and @Lauren Glaze had to tell me I snored #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: Going the extra mile during the Arizona Monster 300 #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: Going the extra mile during the Arizona Monster 300 #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: I lost 12 pounds in under 6 days. but it was worth it. My book dropped on Tuesday during the race which was awesome. The mind is still processing everything. Overall takeaway: I am profoundly grateful to be able to complete incredibly hard things. The Ar
item.description: I lost 12 pounds in under 6 days. but it was worth it. My book dropped on Tuesday during the race which was awesome. The mind is still processing everything. Overall takeaway: I am profoundly grateful to be able to complete incredibly hard things. The Ar

item.title: TL;DR verison. I lost 12 pounds in under 6 days. but it was worth it. My book dropped on Tuesday during the race which was awesome. The mind is still processing everything. Overall takeaway: I am profoundly grateful to be able to complete incredibly hard
item.description: TL;DR verison. I lost 12 pounds in under 6 days. but it was worth it. My book dropped on Tuesday during the race which was awesome. The mind is still processing everything. Overall takeaway: I am profoundly grateful to be able to complete incredibly hard

item.title: They are so beautiful. I shouldn't give them away for free. Arizona Monster 300 was hard on the feet, but I took really good care of them and it worked out well. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: They are so beautiful. I shouldn't give them away for free. Arizona Monster 300 was hard on the feet, but I took really good care of them and it worked out well. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: simple 10 step process #runtok #arizonamonster300
item.description: simple 10 step process #runtok #arizonamonster300

item.title: As captured by my friend Troy Croxdale Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: As captured by my friend Troy Croxdale Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: did you know running 300 miles is hard and far and there are consequences? Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: did you know running 300 miles is hard and far and there are consequences? Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: Everyone talks about hyponatremia (low sodium). High sodium levels are just as dangerous and way less discussed. Here's how it happened: I was eating food high in sodium. Started feeling dizzy and weak. My brain said "you need fuel." So I ate more. The fo
item.description: Everyone talks about hyponatremia (low sodium). High sodium levels are just as dangerous and way less discussed. Here's how it happened: I was eating food high in sodium. Started feeling dizzy and weak. My brain said "you need fuel." So I ate more. The fo

item.title: DNF? Welcome to the club. Every successful person you admire has a collection of failures they learned from. Failure isn't the opposite of success - it's the raw material success is built from. Each DNF, each missed cutoff, each moment you had to swallow
item.description: DNF? Welcome to the club. Every successful person you admire has a collection of failures they learned from. Failure isn't the opposite of success - it's the raw material success is built from. Each DNF, each missed cutoff, each moment you had to swallow

item.title: Strava tax is high in a 300 mile race Arizona Monster 300 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok
item.description: Strava tax is high in a 300 mile race Arizona Monster 300 Smile, or you're doing it wrong #arizonamonster300 #runtok

item.title: Critics are in the stands. You're in the arena. Go be cringe. Post anyway. You'll never know the impact you may have. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok
item.description: Critics are in the stands. You're in the arena. Go be cringe. Post anyway. You'll never know the impact you may have. Smile, or you're doing it wrong #runtok

item.title: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
item.description: Pulled off the win although I had to really work for it. 100 miles/161 km does not come easily. Especially when the race starts at 6pm. Born to Run 100 miler was an incredible experience and I will be back. #runtok #ultramarathon #ultrarunner #borntorun
